summary: SEO Internal Linking & SF Neighborhoods Tests - ALL 22 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Service pages have exactly 12 unique city links in 'Service Areas for {Service}' cluster, (2) City pages have exactly 10 unique service links in 'Popular Repairs in {City}' cluster, (3) SF page has H2 'San Francisco Neighborhoods We Serve' with 12 clickable neighborhood links, (4) 12 neighborhood HTML files exist under build/san-francisco/, (5) sitemap.xml contains 12 neighborhood URLs, (6) React app routing fixed for neighborhood pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed React Router path for SF neighborhoods: Changed from '/san-francisco/:neighborhood-appliance-repair' (invalid param syntax) to '/san-francisco/:neighborhood'
Fixed NeighborhoodPage.js to strip '-appliance-repair' suffix from URL param before looking up neighborhood data
Added cityName='San Francisco' prop to ApplianceRepairPageNew in SanFrancisco.js to enable SF Neighborhoods section rendering
Prerendered HTML files in build/ directory are correct and verified via pytest
React app now properly routes to neighborhood pages and displays content

success_rate.frontend: 100% (SF neighborhoods section, neighborhood page routing, all links verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Internal Linking Phase complete. Service pages display 12 city links via CLUSTER_CITIES array in seo-config.cjs. City pages display 10 service links via CORE_SERVICES_FOR_CITY array. SF page now has 'San Francisco Neighborhoods We Serve' section with 12 clickable links. Neighborhood pages route to /san-francisco/:neighborhood where :neighborhood is like 'sunset-district-appliance-repair'. The NeighborhoodPage component strips '-appliance-repair' suffix before data lookup.

react_app_tests.neighborhood_page_content: PASSED - Displays Sunset District content with ZIP, housing info, FAQs

fixes_applied.fix: Changed to ':neighborhood' which properly captures the full slug

fixes_applied.issue: Component expected param without '-appliance-repair' suffix but route included it
fixes_applied.fix: Added .replace(/-appliance-repair$/, '') to strip suffix from URL param

fixes_applied.issue: SF Neighborhoods section not rendering because cityName prop was missing
fixes_applied.fix: Added cityName='San Francisco' prop to ApplianceRepairPageNew
